summary: Governed schizophrenia rescue task that freezes a gene-level NPC disease-signature and reversal-feature universe before exposing sparse post-cutoff rescue labels for offline evaluation.

artifact_contracts.description: Frozen gene-level ranking inputs derived only from pre-cutoff schizophrenia NPC signature and drug-perturbation evidence.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: Must be materialized from rescue evidence frozen on or before the rescue cutoff and must exclude post-cutoff rescue labels, later source refreshes, and any raw-source dependency at task runtime.

artifact_contracts.description: Post-cutoff rescue-positive labels held out for offline evaluation only.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: May close after the rescue cutoff but must never be exposed to feature construction, ranking, split selection, or threshold tuning.

artifact_contracts.description: Ordered gene-level rescue predictions emitted by downstream rescue task runners.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: Must be derived only from ranking inputs allowed by this contract and must not embed hidden evaluation labels or post-cutoff features.

artifact_contracts.description: Optional operator metadata documenting task scope and freeze selection.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: May describe task scope, split policy, or cutoff intent but must not summarize post-cutoff outcome adjudications.

leakage_boundary.notes: This task remains inside the strict rescue governance lane and requires schema-validated dataset cards, task cards, freeze manifests, split manifests, and lineage artifacts before downstream consumption.

notes: PR-41 should consume only the checked-in frozen ranking and evaluation artifacts declared by this contract and should not call raw-source extraction logic.
